Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Orthos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos was a liaison between the Arelius and the imperial Blackflame family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos's madra overwhelmed his mind after overusing his power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a sacred beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is plagued by a buildup of Blackflame madra in his system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is almost three hundred years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a character who has been helped by elixirs made from Riverseed power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos's spirit feels like a boulder stopping up a volcano.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a dragon-turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos's power is comparable to a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos was supposed to deliver a package to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has made a contract with Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Orthos is a character that circles the mountain but stays away from the Trial grounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Orthos has a core that pulses with eagerness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is an entity that can take a user to Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is a giant turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is a Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos' spirit is in better shape than when Lindon first sensed it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos' spirit contains a painful, burning heat that moves in regular cycles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos suffers from spiritual damage built up in his channels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos sprays Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos can be soothed by an Arelius family member who is not the Underlord without being killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Cassias sent a message about Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos is a sacred beast rated at Truegold strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos' body is blazing with the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos has thick skin like leather armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is a hulking, burning, armored beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos uses an Enforced paw to crack the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos has a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos is a wounded turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos's skin was oozing dark blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos is a turtle with a shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos possesses a ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos has survived three hundred winters and the fall of the Blackflames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos communicates through a contract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is a spirit that follows Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Orthos is an Arelius turtle.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos has black eyes with circles of red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos's shell emits a dull red light and smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is a sacred beast and a turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is the guardian of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Orthos observes the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is a massive black reptile with a shell that smolders with dragonfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos provides heat to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos can withdraw into a shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is a turtle and Lindon's contracted partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos snorts smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a character who follows Fisher Gesha and eats tapestry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos could be used to ease a fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos is a sacred beast that Lindon has fought against many times.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos is currently under restraints.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos is a black, leathery turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos burned a hole in a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos is a turtle that feeds on fear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is a turtle that Lindon rides during the course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos identifies as a dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is a contracted beast with power on the level of a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is cycling Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is a creature with a shell and the ability to breathe fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — He bent his knees as he hit the far wall, landing between Orthos and his pack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is a turtle with a core that feels rolling rage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is Lindon's contracted beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin is waiting for Orthos to arrive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos is a character that can crash through webs and snarl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos cannot speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is a creature that can extend its neck from a shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is present and eating fragments of pottery.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Orthos is a turtle with black eyes containing rings of red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos growled loudly enough to make the sand shake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos can launch dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos has a shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos can release flares of Blackflame madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos' shell is as high as a horse's back and almost as wide as he is tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos has a cracked shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is alive but unconscious and weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos's eyes smolder with orange-red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos had a plan that consisted of hitting something with an arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos instructed Lindon on how to draw aura and convert it to madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos's soul is damaged and weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos provides words that bolster Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos has trained Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos taught Lindon about the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos steps into the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos has a deep red shell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos is a capable swimmer whose feet act like flippers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos's spirit was throbbing with deep pain after his battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos is a turtle whose spirit is improving from the Spirit Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos is nearby Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos' spirit has been cleansed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos can communicate with Lindon through a direct line to his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos is a creature with the power of a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos provides power to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos hit the ground shell-first.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is one step away from breaking through to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is a creature that can whip its tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos's Burning Cloak is dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos is a turtle that can retreat inside its shell and command others.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Little Blue clings to the top of Orthos' head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos roared during the Truegold advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos has black-and-red dragon breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos can bite off techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is a character mentioned as being up on the deck with Lindon and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Orthos can blow smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Orthos smolders with Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos comments on the Skysworn armor leaving the head unprotected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos stomped on a fleeing man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos exists within Lindon's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos does not have Thousand-Mile Clouds stored in his emerald armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos rumbled in response to Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is a broad, black turtle that exists as a smoldering red presence in Lindon's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is leaving for a few years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos left one month ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos's departure caused Lindon to become worked up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos can use water from the Life Well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is afraid that Orthos will never return.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos is a person Lindon fears losing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Orthos is gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Orthos identifies himself as Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Orthos comes from Lindon.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Orthos is a sacred turtle and a descendant of the black dragons of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Orthos's power has leaked away since his arrival and he is currently no higher than a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — Orthos was a Truegold before Kelsa's grandparents were born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon's eyes are compared to Orthos'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos was briefly returned to himself after treatment from Little Blue and Lindon's pure madra.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Orthos is a creature that can shove wooden beams with one foreleg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Orthos is a character who hates waiting for no reason.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos is a turtle located in the western Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is an indistinct lump in the back of Lindon's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos has spent time in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos told stories about sacred artists and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos is a character Lindon mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Orthos was sitting with Yerin and Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is a turtle that can make sounds like an earthquake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is capable of stretching out his head to reach a table.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is capable of radiating concern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is affected by the earth aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is associated with the exiles at the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos is located at the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos observed that there are two Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos leads Lindon's family inside the fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos told Lindon that he saved lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Orthos was eating firewood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is a creature with a shell that can emit smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is an outsider to Lindon's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos eats wooden chests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos' presence in Lindon’s spirit was brighter and stronger than ever.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos used treasures from Lindon's void key to advance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is a turtle whose body fills with soulfire to expand his size.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is a struggling creature being held by the Titan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos is a spirit that is currently weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is a flaming turtle the size of a hill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is a Lord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos has undergone a transformation and is currently the size of an ordinary turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos's shell has glowing red plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is a tiny red-and-black turtle on Lindon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos is a creature that accompanies Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos stays inside the Dawn Sky Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos was too injured to help Lindon in an abandoned laboratory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Orthos is a character Lindon intends to tell about Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is on Lindon's shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos questioned Eithan's plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is a creature that hops on Lindon's shoulder and eats hammers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos felt something stirring in its sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos grumbled about being put down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos breathes flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos can emit a red-and-black glare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Orthos burned blood away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Orthos has black, pebbly skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Orthos is present in the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan orders Orthos to help Lindon with the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon hid Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos ate Lindon's plants and pots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos glared at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos spoke from Yerin’s shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos can transfer his power to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is mentioned by Ziel in relation to an idea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos approaches the Nethergate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos is a character who can blow away dream aura with his soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos is a character who can use soulfire to influence the aura of his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon was forced to leave Orthos behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Orthos was one of the captives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Orthos was being held by Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Orthos felt shock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Orthos grumbled to Eithan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is not safe from the Dreadgod because he is close to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Orthos is one of the six beings threatened by the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos eats apples.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos can absorb constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos comes from Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Orthos chewed on a remaining piece of apple stem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos is a companion of Lindon and Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos is a character who believes they can handle themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos seeks to find the tomb of his ancestors and claim his inheritance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a character whose gaze was passed over by an unnamed individual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos is a turtle that can ignite the Burning Cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos is associated with an ancient castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos is a turtle buried under Shatterspine Castle with Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos chuckled at the Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos has one Archlord black dragon Remnant, two Overlords, six Underlords, fifteen Golds, and one Herald.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Orthos entered the pocket world through a doorway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Orthos carries a void key for Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Orthos is a turtle that can snort smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Orthos is present with Lindon and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos collapsed during the test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos is a turtle who provides encouragement during training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos has four feet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos was reeling from the impact of foreign willpower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos is a source of concern for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos fought alongside Little Blue against a single opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos used lances of dragon's breath and his shell to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos trains in Ghostwind Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos has reached the peak of Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin gave advice to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos and Little Blue were sealed away training together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos was wrestling against the mind and spirit of another while trying not to lose himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos and Little Blue are Archlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos is a human with wrinkled black skin and gray hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos can spit a burst of fire madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos was embarrassed to tie with Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Orthos is a newborn Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon clashed against the Weeping Dragon with Orthos and Little Blue behind him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos crushed Striker techniques in his hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos and Little Blue were too weak to fight the Weeping Dragon alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos shot dragon’s breath that had a touch of the Void and Dragon Icons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Orthos struck the Dragon with a massive dragon’s breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos is bound to the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos experienced a sensation in his mind that caused the world around him to seem to slow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Orthos unleashed techniques to block the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel's role was to keep the storm or movement of the Weeping Dragon from killing Orthos, Little Blue, Mercy, or Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Malice's shadows crept up to Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos used life and blood aura and soulfire to keep Ziel's body going.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos stepped away from Ziel in relief after he was healed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Orthos would have a difficult time establishing authority over the Weeping Dragon's binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Orthos has a human body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Orthos pointed out that no one asked if Dross was worried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Orthos is present during Mercy's preparation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Orthos watched Mercy with a flat look.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Orthos blasted a construct apart with dragon’s breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Orthos spoke gravely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Orthos has black-and-red eyes and uses Blackflame claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Orthos drew from Lindon's cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Orthos rumbled and chewed a handful of gravel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Orthos can snort smoke from his nose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Orthos flanks Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos has leathery skin and gray-winged hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos's eyes are dark orbs with rings of red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos is someone Pride was advised not to listen to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is a creature that lives in a shell on Ziel's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos can blow jets of fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is a barrier island dragon-turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos can land in a pulse of black-and-red fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos smolders like a live coal and has black-and-red eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is a dragon-turtle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is a dragon that travels with Ziel and Carmine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos can stay in a larger size and hear people inside buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos is an elder dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos can call down a tornado of black fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos grew large enough to match G-42.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos teaches dragons that they shouldn't whine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos accompanied Ziel on a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos can shift into a human form of a black-skinned, gray-haired man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos blew out a mouthful of smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos brought a clutch of dragon eggs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos told Dross not to make up words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos suggested naming the world Windfall after their former ship.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
